name: ReasonForStudy
title: Reason for Study (2.9.1 - 1.0.0)
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts that provide additional information to the universal service identifier on why a test, study or review was ordered. Initial values are to support the IHE LCC LAB-7 transaction.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.definition: Requests that the specimen should be stored long term
Requests verification of previously reported results

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.display: Store residual specimen pending follow up
concept.definition: Requests that the specimen should be saved for a short duration until follow up is completed
Requests interpretation of previously reported results

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: Requests comparison of previously reported results amongst themselves

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify when an incorrect test was performed for the target order

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify orders and the respective results, where problems occurred during ordering

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify when a patient identification issue has occurred on the target order

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: Requests verification of previously reported results due to suspected interference

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify orders, where problems occurred during sample collection

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify orders, where problems occurred during sample transport

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify results with excessive reporting delay

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested

concept.definition: For process improvement work this code can be used to identify when incorrect result were reported for the target order

property.valueString: Used to indicate why review is requested
